scroll to begin ↓

A Story Within A Story

The Olive
Tree

By the shores of the Ganga · Near the West Himalayas

scroll to begin ↓

Scene I · A Rainy Night

A Lost Writer &
A Fairy

✦ · ✦

Few decades ago, before technology was even heard of, a miserable writer lived alone near the shores of the Ganga, a few miles west of the Himalayas — passing his days putting thoughts on paper.


On a rainy night, with only a Fairy for company and no new stories left to write, the Fairy pointed at the Olive Tree outside.

The writer wondered — a tree has a story?

The Lost Writer
The Narrator

He had spent his whole life looking at the tree outside his window — never knowing its secret.

Scene II · Long Before Time

Ramu &
Sindri

✦ · ✦

Far back — before human colonies even existed — humans and demons shared this land. In a small village, farming families lived happily. Among them: Ramu, a father who had lost his wife. He lived only for his daughter — Sindri.


They wanted nothing more than each other's love. Their bond carried them through every hardship.

The Girl
Sindri
The Father
Ramu
Scene III · The Night of Terror

The Demons
Strike

✦ · ✦

The village was plunged into terror when demons from the mountains attacked — always at night, always without mercy.


One dreadful night they descended on Ramu's home and seized Sindri, dragging her into the darkness of the mountain caves. The villagers — and her father — stood helpless.

The demons retreated to their cave before the break of dawn…
Scene IV · Love at First Sight

Ivan,
the Shepherd Boy

✦ · ✦

A young shepherd named Ivan ventured deep into the mountains to tend his sheep. Through the winter silence he heard sobbing from a cave. Inside — Sindri, a prisoner while the demons slept.


Ivan fell for her beauty and innocence at once. Love at first sight. He rushed back and enlisted his reindeer friends to race her to safety — but the heavy winter snow slowed them dangerously.

The Shepherd Boy
Ivan
Ivan's companions
The Reindeers
His flock
The Sheep
Scene V · Magic & Hope

Ren,
the Fairy

✦ · ✦

Caught again, Sindri was locked away more securely. But Ivan never stopped. This time he sought his fairy friend — Ren — the very same fairy who, decades later, would narrate this story to the old writer (for fairies do not die).


Together they reached the cave. Ren's magic broke the locks — but the spell's echo woke the demons once more. They ran.

The Fairy
Ren
Scene VI · The Cruel Turn

The River
Takes Her

✦ · ✦

They ran with everything they had. But a giant demon hurled a massive log through the air. It struck them both hard. Sindri tumbled into the flowing river and was swept away — vanishing into the dark current.


Ivan dove in after her — searching, calling — but found no trace of where the river had taken her.

The Himalayan river that carried Sindri away into the unknown…
Scene VII · The Boy Becomes the Tree

Rooted
in Love

✦ · ✦

As daylight came and the demons retreated, Ivan kept searching. Days passed. Weeks passed. He stood on the shore where she had fallen — and as days turned to years, by the riverside plants, he took root.


He became a tree.

The boy who became a tree — roots forever reaching into the river below…
Scene VIII · Ren Reflects

A Hundred Years
of Searching

✦ · ✦

Then Ren turned to the writer, gently:

Scene IX · The Final Page

The Last
Story Written

✦ · ✦

The clock struck midnight. Moved beyond words, the writer took up his beloved pen — Vior — and wrote his last and finest story.


When the final word was set down, he placed the pen beside him — and took his last breath, doing his most beloved work.


Ren gently lifted the pen from his still hand — and completed the story.

Vior — the pen — wrote the final words by candlelight…
